name: EngageBayConnector
description: Connects to the EngageBay all-in-one SMB CRM (Contacts, Companies, Deals, Tasks, Tickets, Notes) via the documented REST API at app.engagebay.com/dev/api/panel. Sends the API key RAW in the Authorization header (no Bearer prefix). Supports contact CRUD, deal/task/company/ticket queries, deal + task creation, note attachment, and KB sync of contacts.

install_fields.label: EngageBay REST API Key
install_fields.placeholder: Paste your EngageBay REST API key
install_fields.help: From EngageBay → Account → Account Settings → API Settings → REST API Key. The key is sent RAW in the Authorization header (no Bearer prefix).

install_fields.label: EngageBay API Base URL
install_fields.help: Override only for sandbox or self-hosted environments. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Soft rate-limit hint used by sync/batch operations. EngageBay's documented quota is 60 req/min for most plans.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates the EngageBay API key by hitting /subusers/list and persists the connector config.

apis.name: Authorize (API Key)
apis.description: API-key connectors have no OAuth dance — returns the stored key wrapped in a TokenInfo.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies EngageBay API connectivity by calling GET /subusers/list.

apis.name: List Contacts
apis.description: GET /contacts — cursor-paginated. Returns the raw EngageBay payload (items + cursor).

apis.name: Get Contact
apis.description: GET /contacts/{id} — fetch a single contact and return a flat normalized dict.

apis.name: Create Contact
apis.description: POST /contacts — properties is a list of {name, value, field_type} entries.

apis.name: Update Contact (Partial)
apis.description: PUT /contacts/update-partial/{id} — partial update via properties list.

apis.name: Create Task
apis.description: POST /tasks. due_date is a Unix epoch (ms).

apis.name: Add Note to Contact
apis.description: POST /contacts/{id}/note — attach a free-text note to a contact.

apis.name: Sync Contacts
apis.description: Walks /contacts page-by-page (cursor pagination) and ingests each as a NormalizedDocument into the Shielva KB.
